title: Choose Your Plan
subtitle: Start free with Community edition. Upgrade when you need more.

community.name: Community
community.description: Perfect for individuals and small teams getting started with ontology design.

cloud.name: Cloud Pro
cloud.description: For teams who want managed AI, full export formats, and real-time collaboration.

features.export: All export formats including HTML, ZIP, Mermaid

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For organizations requiring SSO, RBAC, audit trails, and dedicated support.

byok.a: Bring Your Own Key means you use your own AI provider API keys. This gives you full control over costs and provider choice.

selfHost.q: Can I self-host the Cloud features?
selfHost.a: The Community edition is fully self-hostable. Cloud features require our managed platform for real-time sync and collaboration.

trial.q: Is there a free trial for Cloud Pro?
trial.a: Yes! Cloud Pro includes a 14-day free trial with full access to all features.
